title: Curver My Style Medium Rectangular Storage Basket, Vintage White, 13 Litre
features: Stylish and versatile storage – Ideal for kitchen, bathroom, bedroom, utility room, or living areas, helping organise essentials in every space
Elegant rattan effect design – Classic woven look with a flat inner surface for a clean, modern aesthetic that suits any interior décor
Compact yet spacious – 12-litre capacity offers practical storage for toiletries, cleaning products, accessories, or small household items
Durable and lightweight – Made from high-quality plastic that is easy to carry, long-lasting, and simple to clean with just a damp cloth
Stackable and space-saving – Smart rectangular shape allows for efficient stacking when not in use, saving valuable space in cupboards or on shelves
description: From the manufacturer Curver My Style Rattan Effect Range The Curver My Style range offers a versatile selection of rattan effect storage baskets in sizes from 4 to 28 litres, making it easy to keep every room in your home neat and organised. With their timeless flat rattan design, these baskets combine elegance with practicality, offering a stylish solution for the bathroom, kitchen, living room, office or study. The open weave provides ventilation, while the smooth inner surface ensures easy cleaning and stacking. Lightweight yet durable, each basket is built for everyday use and designed to last. With multiple capacities to choose from, you can store anything from small accessories to larger household items, helping to reduce clutter and maximise space. Compact and stackable, the My Style baskets fit seamlessly into cupboards, shelves or open spaces, making them the perfect blend of function and style for modern living.
